name: Milestone tracker

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to show, in sequence, which key milestones in a delivery plan are complete, in progress, or upcoming, such as for project updates, release roadmaps, migration phases, and approval flows; use a flowchart for milestones with complex branches or dependencies, and progress-dashboard when the focus is completion across multiple metrics.
en.why_valuable: A plain list makes it hard to see at a glance how far a linear project has progressed; this template creates a clear rhythm with a horizontal connector, completed checkmark nodes, a current dot node, and subdued future nodes, switching automatically to a vertical track on phone widths.

data_in.note: data.milestones renders in array order. status accepts only 'done', 'current', or 'upcoming'; unknown values become upcoming. There should usually be only one current item, but the template does not enforce this. date is display text and may be an ISO or human-readable date; the component does not parse, sort, or calculate dates.

schema.title?: string -- track title; displays "Milestone tracker" when omitted
schema.subtitle?: string -- short description of the project, version, or time range
schema.milestones: {title:string,date?:string,status:'done'|'current'|'upcoming',detail?:string}[] -- sorted milestones; title is the milestone name, date is display text, detail is one supplementary sentence, and status determines the node symbol and connector color

spec.note: Height grows with content; desktop uses a horizontally scrollable track with at least 190px per milestone, switching to a vertical track below 580px. No vh/percentage height.

when_to_use: 需要按先后顺序展示一个交付计划已经完成、当前进行和未来待办的关键节点时用它，适合项目更新、发布路线、迁移阶段和审批流程；若节点带复杂分支或依赖应用流程图，若只看多个指标完成度则用 progress-dashboard。
why_valuable: 线性项目状态用普通列表难以快速感知“走到哪一步”；本模板以水平连线、✓完成节点、•当前节点和弱化的未来节点建立清晰节奏，并在手机宽度自动切换为垂直轨道。

data_in.note: data.milestones 按数组顺序渲染。status 只接受 'done'、'current'、'upcoming'，未知值按 upcoming；通常应只有一个 current，但模板不会强制。date 是展示文本，可用 ISO 日期或人类可读日期；组件不解析、排序或计算日期。

schema.title?: string —— 轨迹标题；省略时显示 “Milestone tracker”
schema.subtitle?: string —— 项目、版本或时间范围短说明
schema.milestones: {title:string,date?:string,status:'done'|'current'|'upcoming',detail?:string}[] —— 已排序节点；title 为里程碑名，date 为展示日期，detail 为一句补充，status 决定节点符号与连线颜色

spec.note: 按内容自动增高；桌面为最小 190px/节点的水平可滚动轨道，580px 以下改为垂直轨道。无 vh/百分比高度。

example._why: 六步产品发布路径同时包含 done、current、upcoming 和日期详情，能验证连接线、当前焦点、完成计数及移动端布局。

uplink: 纯 display 组件，无 uplink；所有状态均由 data 决定，不向 AI 或宿主回传选择。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一零依赖模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified
